shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -400
find pages components styles -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "--- {}"; sed -n "1,240p" "{}"'

cat package.json && printf '
--- next version ---
' && node -p "require('./node_modules/next/package.json').version" && printf '
--- docs ---
' && find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort | sed -n '1,120p'

sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/02-guides/migrating/app-router-migration.mdx && printf '
--- layouts/pages ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/03-layouts-and-pages.mdx && printf '
--- route handlers ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/15-route-handlers.mdx && printf '
--- error handling ---
' && sed -n '1,240p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/10-error-handling.mdx

sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/04-functions/generate-static-params.mdx && printf '
--- headers ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/04-functions/headers.mdx && printf '
--- metadata ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/14-metadata-and-og-images.mdx && printf '
--- use-router ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/04-functions/use-router.mdx
cat tsconfig.json && printf '\n--- next config ---\n' && cat next.config.ts
find app -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "--- {}"; sed -n "1,220p" "{}"'
